name: Volatility-Adjusted Momentum Top-3 Full Universe + 15% Vol Target
description: Selects top 3 assets by risk-adjusted momentum (12-month return / 63-day vol) from all 13 assets, weights by inverse volatility, then scales to 15% annualised volatility. Applies the Sharpe-momentum signal across equities, AI, commodities, precious metals, and bonds.
